about.construction: This site is under construction and will evolve with me as I progress through my projects and experiences.
about.contact: Please feel free to contact me. I would be very happy to assist you with your future projects.
about.intro: Welcome to my portfolio, a space where I centralize my projects, my CV, and various ways to get to know me.
about.passion: Loving problem-solving and enjoying learning, I naturally turned to computer science, a new field with so much to discover and evolving at a remarkable speed.
about.skills: My journey has led me to work with different programming languages and several frameworks. This diversity reflects my adaptability and quick learning, and I am confident in my ability to master your tools and technologies to become the resource you need.
